source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/251230 페루 TEMSA, 2,3G - 이창민 팀장님/Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector/6. Certificate of Assurance quality/Final Inspection test report.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Final Inspection Test Report for Abyz Digital Detector models A1417MCW, F1417MCW, and A1717MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports quality assurance by recording final inspection, safety, performance, and combination test results for specified detector serial numbers.
keyPoints: Product name is listed as Abyz Digital Detector for models A1417MCW, F1417MCW, and A1717MCW.
Inspection date, manufacture date, and approval dates are shown as 25-12-22.
Electrical safety tests include power input, dielectric strength, protective earth conductor resistance, earth leakage current, patient leakage current, and touch current tests.
Performance information includes pixel defect, defect density, sensitivity, MTF, and DQE results.

Combination testing includes wired image acquisition, console software access control, patient search, image save, image transmission, program close, zoom, rotation, DICOM suitability, contrast control, and partial enlargement.

evidence.claim: The performance information test method follows the test method of the test standard.

evidence.claim: Combination testing verifies image acquisition in wired communication state.
evidence.evidenceText: Image must be acquired in wired communication state Check the image by connecting wired communication. PASS

evidence.claim: Console software access rights are checked to prevent unauthorized use.
evidence.evidenceText: Console Software Access rights should be appropriately set to prevent unauthorized users from using them.

evidence.claim: DICOM suitability testing requires DICOM transmission and DICOM output.
evidence.evidenceText: DICOM Suitability DICOM must be transmitted. Click Close Study or Send to confirm the DICOM transmission by checking the blue light in the PACS status window. PASS It should be DICOM output. Click Print to confirm DICOM Print. PASS

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text.
The date value 25-12-22 is present but the source does not define the date format or century.
The source is a combined preprocessed text containing multiple model reports under one document title.
OCR or text extraction quality appears imperfect, including misspellings such as Primary-Enclusure and Patient Appied Part.
The text mentions a test standard but does not identify the standard name or number.
